---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
      - data/index.json
      - data/ccusage_daily.json
      - data/ccusage_sessions.json
      - data/ccusage_blocks.json
      - data/gemini_daily.json
      - data/gemini_sessions.json
      - data/cmonitor_summary.json
      - data/git_commits.json
      - data/unified_sessions.json
      - data/unified_costs.json
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 1200

# WebR runtime bundles rlang 1.1.6 but R 4.5 repo has 1.2.0.
# Loading rlang FIRST forces the preload scanner to download 1.2.0
# from repo before shiny/bslib lock in the bundled 1.1.6.
# See memory/shinylive-issues.md for history of this pattern.
library(rlang)

library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(DT)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(tidyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(echarts4r)

# --- Data loading -------------------------------------------------------------
base_url <- "https://johngavin.github.io/llmtelemetry"

load_json <- function(filename) {
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
    download.file(paste0(base_url, "/data/", filename), tmp, mode = "w", quiet = TRUE)
    fromJSON(txt = tmp, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Failed to load ", filename, ": ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

cc_daily    <- load_json("ccusage_daily.json")
cc_sessions <- load_json("ccusage_sessions.json")
cc_blocks   <- load_json("ccusage_blocks.json")
gem_daily   <- load_json("gemini_daily.json")
gem_sess    <- load_json("gemini_sessions.json")
cmon        <- load_json("cmonitor_summary.json")
git_commits <- load_json("git_commits.json")
u_sessions  <- load_json("unified_sessions.json")
u_costs     <- load_json("unified_costs.json")

# Parse dates
if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) {
  cc_daily$date <- as.Date(cc_daily$date)
}
if (!is.null(cc_sessions) && nrow(cc_sessions) > 0) {
  cc_sessions$lastActivity <- as.Date(cc_sessions$lastActivity)
}
if (!is.null(cc_blocks) && nrow(cc_blocks) > 0) {
  # Support both ISO 8601 (ccusage: 2026-04-21T12:00:00) and space-separated (cmonitor-rs: 2026-04-21 12:00:00)
  parse_ts <- function(x) {
    t <- as.POSIXct(x, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
    na_idx <- is.na(t) & !is.na(x)
    if (any(na_idx)) t[na_idx] <- as.POSIXct(x[na_idx], format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC")
    t
  }
  cc_blocks$startTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$endTime   <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$endTime)
  cc_blocks$actualEndTime <- parse_ts(cc_blocks$actualEndTime)
  cc_blocks$date <- as.Date(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$hour <- hour(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$wday <- wday(cc_blocks$startTime, label = TRUE)
  cc_blocks$duration_hrs <- as.numeric(
    difftime(coalesce(cc_blocks$actualEndTime, cc_blocks$endTime),
             cc_blocks$startTime, units = "hours")
  )
  cc_blocks$cost_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$costUSD / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 2), 0)
  cc_blocks$tok_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$totalTokens / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 0), 0)
}
if (!is.null(gem_daily) && nrow(gem_daily) > 0) {
  gem_daily$date <- as.Date(gem_daily$date)
}
if (!is.null(git_commits) && nrow(git_commits) > 0) {
  git_commits$date <- as.Date(git_commits$date)
}
if (!is.null(u_sessions) && nrow(u_sessions) > 0) {
  u_sessions$started_at <- as.POSIXct(u_sessions$started_at, tz = "UTC")
  u_sessions$date <- as.Date(u_sessions$started_at)
}
if (!is.null(u_costs) && nrow(u_costs) > 0) {
  u_costs$date <- as.Date(u_costs$date)
}

# All project names for filter
all_projects <- if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) {
  sort(unique(cc_daily$project))
} else {
  character(0)
}

# Date range
all_dates <- c(
  if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) cc_daily$date,
  if (!is.null(gem_daily) && nrow(gem_daily) > 0) gem_daily$date
)
date_min <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) min(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date() - 90
date_max <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) max(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date()
max_days <- as.numeric(date_max - date_min)

# --- echarts4r dark theme helper ---------------------------------------------
pal <- list(claude = "#377eb8", gemini = "#e41a1c", accent = "#4daf4a",
            purple = "#984ea3", orange = "#ff7f00", hist = "#377eb8")

dark_echart <- function(e) {
  e |>
    e_theme("dark") |>
    e_tooltip(trigger = "axis") |>
    e_legend(bottom = 0, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc")) |>
    e_grid(containLabel = TRUE)
}

empty_echart <- function(msg = "No data available") {
  e_charts() |>
    e_theme("dark") |>
    e_title(msg, textStyle = list(color = "#ccc", fontSize = 14)) |>
    e_grid(containLabel = TRUE)
}

# --- UI -----------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = "LLM Telemetry",
  theme = bs_theme(
    bg = "#1a1a1a", fg = "#e0e0e0",
    primary = "#377eb8", secondary = "#555555",
    font_scale = 0.85
  ),
  header = tagList(
    tags$style(HTML("
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-value { font-size: 1.4rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .bslib-value-box .value-box-title { font-size: 0.75rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
      .card { background-color: #222 !important; border-color: #444 !important; cursor: zoom-in; }
      .card-header { background-color: #2a2a2a !important; color: #e0e0e0 !important; font-size: 0.85rem; }
      .card-footer { background-color: #1a1a1a !important; border-color: #333 !important; }
      .sidebar-content { background-color: #222 !important; }
      /* All table cells: never wrap */
      table.dataTable th, table.dataTable td { white-space: nowrap !important; }
      table.dataTable { color: #e0e0e0 !important; }
      table.dataTable thead th { color: #e0e0e0 !important; background-color: #2a2a2a !important; }
      table.dataTable tbody td { border-color: #444 !important; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input { background-color: #333; color: #e0e0e0; border-color: #555; }
      .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_info, .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_paginate { color: #ccc !important; }
      .dataTables_scrollBody { max-height: none !important; }
      /* Fullscreen card: in-place, centred, ~50vh tall to fit 15in laptop */
      .card.card-fullscreen {
        position: fixed !important; top: 50% !important; left: 50% !important;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) !important;
        width: 96vw !important; max-height: 55vh !important; z-index: 99999 !important;
        background: #1a1a1a !important; cursor: zoom-out !important;
        overflow: auto !important; border-radius: 6px !important;
        padding: 10px !important; margin: 0 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.9) !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .echarts4r-container {
        width: calc(96vw - 40px) !important; height: 42vh !important;
      }
      .card.card-fullscreen .dataTables_wrapper {
        font-size: 14px; overflow: auto; max-height: 42vh;
      }
      .card-fullscreen-hint {
        position: fixed; top: 8px; right: 20px; color: #888;
        font-size: 12px; z-index: 100000; pointer-events: none;
      }
    ")),
    tags$script(HTML("
      var fsCard = null;
      var fsHint = null;

      function exitFullscreen() {
        if (!fsCard) return;
        fsCard.classList.remove('card-fullscreen');
        fsCard = null;
        if (fsHint) { fsHint.remove(); fsHint = null; }
      }

      function enterFullscreen(card) {
        if (fsCard) exitFullscreen();
        fsCard = card;
        card.classList.add('card-fullscreen');
        // Add hint
        fsHint = document.createElement('div');
        fsHint.className = 'card-fullscreen-hint';
        fsHint.textContent = 'Click card or press Esc to exit';
        document.body.appendChild(fsHint);
        // Recalc DT column widths
        var dtApi = card.querySelector('.dataTable');
        if (dtApi && dtApi.DataTable) {
          try { dtApi.DataTable().columns.adjust(); } catch(e) {}
        }
      }

      // Click card -> toggle fullscreen (not value boxes)
      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        var card = e.target.closest('.card');
        if (!card) return;
        // Skip value boxes
        if (card.querySelector('.value-box-value')) return;
        if (fsCard === card) {
          exitFullscreen();
        } else if (!fsCard) {
          enterFullscreen(card);
        }
      });

      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') exitFullscreen();
      });
    "))
  ),
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 220,
    sliderInput("horizon", "Time Horizon (days)",
      min = 7, max = max(max_days, 30), value = min(90, max_days), step = 7),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Cost Trends' || input.tabs == 'Token Analysis'",
      selectInput("projects", "Projects", choices = all_projects,
        selected = all_projects, multiple = TRUE)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Sessions'",
      numericInput("top_n", "Top N sessions", value = 10, min = 5, max = 50)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Time Blocks'",
      sliderInput("block_days", "Block window (days)",
        min = 1, max = 60, value = 14, step = 1)
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Overview", value = "Overview",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(3, 3, 3, 3),
      value_box("Total Cost", textOutput("vb_cost"), theme = "primary"),
      value_box("Total Tokens", textOutput("vb_tokens"), theme = "info"),
      value_box("Active Days", textOutput("vb_days"), theme = "success"),
      value_box("Sessions", textOutput("vb_sessions"), theme = "warning")
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Source Summary"), DTOutput("overview_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost, tokens, and session counts per data source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost (All Sources)"), echarts4rOutput("overview_cost_ts", height = "350px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily cost time series combining Claude and Gemini usage"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Cost Trends", value = "Cost Trends",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost by Project"), echarts4rOutput("cost_by_project", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily Claude cost by project (lines+markers)")),
      card(card_header("Cumulative Cost"), echarts4rOutput("cost_cumulative", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Running total of cost over time by source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Source"), echarts4rOutput("cost_weekly", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost grouped by Claude vs Gemini")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Model"), echarts4rOutput("cost_by_model", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost by Claude model variant"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Token Analysis", value = "Token Analysis",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Tokens"), echarts4rOutput("token_daily", height = "350px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily token consumption across all sources"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Token Composition"), echarts4rOutput("token_comp", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Grouped bars: input, output, cache-create, and cache-read tokens")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Tokens by Source"), echarts4rOutput("token_weekly", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly token usage by source"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Sessions", value = "Sessions",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Claude Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_claude"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Claude Code sessions from unified.duckdb telemetry")),
      card(card_header("Top Gemini Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_gemini"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most expensive Gemini sessions by total cost"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Session Duration Distribution"), echarts4rOutput("sess_hist", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Histogram of session durations (minutes)")),
      card(card_header("Sessions Over Time"), echarts4rOutput("sess_scatter", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily session count, bubble size = total minutes"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Time Blocks", value = "Time Blocks",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Block Activity"), DTOutput("block_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Claude coding blocks with cost and efficiency metrics"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Block Timeline"), echarts4rOutput("block_timeline", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost per block, dot size = duration")),
      card(card_header("Hourly Activity Heatmap"), echarts4rOutput("block_heatmap", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost heatmap by day of week and hour"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Commits", value = "Commits",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(4, 4, 4),
      value_box("Total Commits", textOutput("vb_commits"), theme = "primary"),
      value_box("Median Lines", textOutput("vb_median_lines"), theme = "info"),
      value_box("Mean Lines", textOutput("vb_mean_lines"), theme = "success")
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed per Commit"), echarts4rOutput("commit_hist", height = "350px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Distribution of total lines changed per commit"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed Over Time"), echarts4rOutput("commit_scatter_time", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines changed per commit over time, sized by files changed")),
      card(card_header("Additions vs Deletions"), echarts4rOutput("commit_scatter_add_del", height = "300px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines added vs deleted per commit"))
    )
  ),

  footer = tags$footer(
    class = "text-muted small text-center py-2",
    style = "background-color: #1a1a1a;",
    tags$a(href = "https://github.com/johngavin/llmtelemetry", style = "color: #7cb5ec;", "GitHub"),
    " | Data: ccusage, Gemini, cmonitor, unified.duckdb",
    " | Built: ", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
  ),

  id = "tabs"
)

# --- Server -------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  cutoff <- reactive(date_max - input$horizon)

  # Filtered datasets
  cc_d <- reactive({
    if (is.null(cc_daily) || nrow(cc_daily) == 0) return(tibble())
    cc_daily |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })
  gem_d <- reactive({
    if (is.null(gem_daily) || nrow(gem_daily) == 0) return(tibble())
    gem_daily |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })
  cc_d_proj <- reactive({
    d <- cc_d()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(d)
    if (length(input$projects) > 0) d <- d |> filter(project %in% input$projects)
    d
  })

  # --- Overview ---------------------------------------------------------------
  output$vb_cost <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalCost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_cost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    sprintf("$%s", format(round(cc + gm), big.mark = ","))
  })
  output$vb_tokens <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    total <- cc + gm
    if (total >= 1e9) sprintf("%.1fB", total / 1e9)
    else if (total >= 1e6) sprintf("%.1fM", total / 1e6)
    else format(total, big.mark = ",")
  })
  output$vb_days <- renderText({
    dates <- c(
      if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) unique(cc_d()$date),
      if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) unique(gem_d()$date)
    )
    as.character(length(unique(dates)))
  })
  output$vb_sessions <- renderText({
    n <- if (!is.null(u_sessions) && nrow(u_sessions) > 0) {
      nrow(u_sessions |> filter(date >= cutoff()))
    } else {
      0L
    }
    n <- n + if (!is.null(gem_sess)) nrow(gem_sess) else 0
    as.character(n)
  })

  output$overview_table <- renderDT({
    rows <- list()

    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_sum <- cc_d() |>
        summarise(
          cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), tokens = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
          days = n_distinct(date),
          min_date = min(date), max_date = max(date)
        )
      rows[[1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "Claude (ccusage)",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", cc_sum$cost),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", cc_sum$cost / max(cc_sum$days, 1)),
        Tokens = format(cc_sum$tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = cc_sum$days,
        Sessions = if (!is.null(cc_sessions)) nrow(cc_sessions) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(cc_sum$min_date, "to", cc_sum$max_date)
      )
    }

    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_sum <- gem_d() |>
        summarise(
          cost = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE), tokens = sum(total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE),
          days = n_distinct(date),
          min_date = min(date), max_date = max(date)
        )
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "Gemini",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", gm_sum$cost),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", gm_sum$cost / max(gm_sum$days, 1)),
        Tokens = format(gm_sum$tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = gm_sum$days,
        Sessions = if (!is.null(gem_sess)) nrow(gem_sess) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(gm_sum$min_date, "to", gm_sum$max_date)
      )
    }

    if (!is.null(cmon) && !is.null(cmon$total_cost)) {
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "cmonitor",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", cmon$total_cost),
        `$/Day` = "-",
        Tokens = format(cmon$total_tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = NA_integer_,
        Sessions = NA_integer_,
        `Date Range` = if (!is.null(cmon$date_range)) cmon$date_range else "-"
      )
    }

    tbl <- bind_rows(rows)
    datatable(tbl, options = list(dom = "t", paging = FALSE, searching = FALSE,
        scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = FALSE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$overview_cost_ts <- renderEcharts4r({
    has_cc  <- nrow(cc_d()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(empty_echart())

    if (has_cc) {
      cc_agg <- cc_d() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(claude = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      gm_agg <- gem_d() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(gemini = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- full_join(cc_agg, gm_agg, by = "date") |>
        mutate(across(c(claude, gemini), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) |>
        arrange(date)
      e <- d |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    } else if (has_cc) {
      e <- cc_agg |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    } else {
      e <- gm_agg |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  # --- Cost Trends ------------------------------------------------------------
  output$cost_by_project <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d_agg <- d |> group_by(date, project) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    e <- d_agg |> group_by(project) |>
      e_charts(date) |>
      e_line(cost)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$cost_cumulative <- renderEcharts4r({
    has_cc  <- nrow(cc_d()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(empty_echart())

    if (has_cc) {
      cc_cum <- cc_d() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        arrange(date) |> mutate(claude = cumsum(cost))
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      gm_cum <- gem_d() |> arrange(date) |>
        mutate(gemini = cumsum(total_cost))
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- full_join(
        cc_cum |> select(date, claude),
        gm_cum |> select(date, gemini),
        by = "date"
      ) |> mutate(across(c(claude, gemini), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) |> arrange(date)
      e <- d |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    } else if (has_cc) {
      e <- cc_cum |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    } else {
      e <- gm_cum |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$cost_weekly <- renderEcharts4r({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_wk <- cc_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Claude")
      rows[[1]] <- cc_wk
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_wk <- gem_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(cost = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Gemini")
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- gm_wk
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d <- bind_rows(rows)
    e <- d |> group_by(source) |>
      e_charts(week) |>
      e_bar(cost)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$cost_by_model <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())

    model_weekly <- d |>
      separate_rows(modelsUsed, sep = ",\\s*") |>
      filter(modelsUsed != "") |>
      mutate(
        model = gsub("claude-", "", modelsUsed),
        week = floor_date(date, "week")
      ) |>
      group_by(week, model) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    e <- model_weekly |> group_by(model) |>
      e_charts(week) |>
      e_line(cost)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  # --- Token Analysis ---------------------------------------------------------
  output$token_daily <- renderEcharts4r({
    has_cc  <- nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0
    has_gem <- nrow(gem_d()) > 0
    if (!has_cc && !has_gem) return(empty_echart())

    if (has_cc) {
      cc_tok <- cc_d_proj() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(claude = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    }
    if (has_gem) {
      gm_tok <- gem_d() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(gemini = sum(total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    }

    if (has_cc && has_gem) {
      d <- full_join(cc_tok, gm_tok, by = "date") |>
        mutate(across(c(claude, gemini), ~replace_na(.x, 0))) |>
        arrange(date)
      e <- d |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    } else if (has_cc) {
      e <- cc_tok |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(claude, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    } else {
      e <- gm_tok |> e_charts(date) |>
        e_line(gemini, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$token_comp <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    tok <- d |> group_by(date) |>
      summarise(
        Input = sum(inputTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
        Output = sum(outputTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
        `Cache Create` = sum(cacheCreation, na.rm = TRUE),
        `Cache Read` = sum(cacheRead, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      pivot_longer(-date, names_to = "type", values_to = "tokens")
    e <- tok |> group_by(type) |>
      e_charts(date) |>
      e_bar(tokens)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$token_weekly <- renderEcharts4r({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0) {
      cc_wk <- cc_d_proj() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(tokens = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Claude")
      rows[[1]] <- cc_wk
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_wk <- gem_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(tokens = sum(total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Gemini")
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- gm_wk
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d <- bind_rows(rows)
    e <- d |> group_by(source) |>
      e_charts(week) |>
      e_bar(tokens)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  # --- Sessions ---------------------------------------------------------------
  output$sess_claude <- renderDT({
    if (is.null(u_sessions) || nrow(u_sessions) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    u_sessions |>
      filter(date >= cutoff()) |>
      arrange(desc(started_at)) |>
      head(input$top_n) |>
      mutate(
        Duration = sprintf("%.0f min", duration_min),
        Started = format(started_at, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
      ) |>
      select(Project = project, Started, Duration) |>
      datatable(options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_gemini <- renderDT({
    if (is.null(gem_sess) || nrow(gem_sess) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    gem_sess |>
      arrange(desc(total_cost)) |>
      head(input$top_n) |>
      mutate(total_cost = sprintf("$%.4f", total_cost),
             total_tokens = format(total_tokens, big.mark = ",")) |>
      select(Session = sessionId, Project = project, Cost = total_cost,
             Tokens = total_tokens, Started = start_time) |>
      datatable(options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_hist <- renderEcharts4r({
    if (is.null(u_sessions) || nrow(u_sessions) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d <- u_sessions |> filter(date >= cutoff(), duration_min > 0)
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    # Pre-bin for histogram using base R hist()
    h <- hist(d$duration_min, breaks = 20, plot = FALSE)
    bins <- tibble(
      mid = h$mids,
      count = h$counts
    )
    e <- bins |> e_charts(mid) |>
      e_bar(count, name = "Sessions", color = pal$hist, legend = FALSE)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$sess_scatter <- renderEcharts4r({
    if (is.null(u_sessions) || nrow(u_sessions) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d <- u_sessions |> filter(date >= cutoff(), duration_min > 0)
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    daily <- d |> group_by(date) |>
      summarise(n = n(), total_min = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    e <- daily |> e_charts(date) |>
      e_scatter(n, size = total_min, name = "Sessions/Day", color = pal$claude, legend = FALSE)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  # --- Time Blocks ------------------------------------------------------------
  blk <- reactive({
    if (is.null(cc_blocks) || nrow(cc_blocks) == 0) return(tibble())
    cc_blocks |> filter(date >= (date_max - input$block_days))
  })

  output$block_table <- renderDT({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    d |>
      mutate(
        Day = format(date, "%a %Y-%m-%d"),
        Start = format(startTime, "%H:%M"),
        End = format(coalesce(actualEndTime, endTime), "%H:%M"),
        Duration = sprintf("%.1fh", duration_hrs),
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", costUSD),
        `$/hr` = sprintf("$%.2f", cost_per_hr),
        Tokens = format(totalTokens, big.mark = ","),
        `Tok/hr` = format(tok_per_hr, big.mark = ",")
      ) |>
      select(Day, Start, End, Duration, Cost, `$/hr`, Tokens, `Tok/hr`, Models = models) |>
      datatable(
        extensions = "RowGroup",
        options = list(
          pageLength = 25, dom = "frtip", scrollX = TRUE,
          rowGroup = list(dataSrc = 0),
          columnDefs = list(
            list(visible = FALSE, targets = 0),
            list(targets = 8, render = DT::JS(
              "function(data, type, row) { return '<span style=\"white-space:nowrap\">' + data + '</span>'; }"
            ))
          ),
          order = list(list(0, "desc"))
        ),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$block_timeline <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    d <- d |>
      mutate(label = format(startTime, "%m-%d %H:%M")) |>
      arrange(startTime)
    e <- d |> e_charts(costUSD) |>
      e_scatter(duration_hrs, size = costUSD, name = "Block", color = pal$claude, legend = FALSE) |>
      e_tooltip(formatter = htmlwidgets::JS(
        "function(p) { return '$' + p.value[0].toFixed(2) + ' | ' + p.value[1].toFixed(1) + 'h'; }"
      ))
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$block_heatmap <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    heat <- d |>
      group_by(wday, hour) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(costUSD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      complete(wday, hour = 0:23, fill = list(cost = 0)) |>
      mutate(wday = as.character(wday))
    e <- heat |> e_charts(hour) |>
      e_heatmap(wday, cost) |>
      e_visual_map(cost, inRange = list(color = c("#1a1a1a", pal$orange, pal$gemini)))
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  # --- Commits -----------------------------------------------------------------
  commits_filt <- reactive({
    if (is.null(git_commits) || nrow(git_commits) == 0) return(tibble())
    git_commits |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })

  output$vb_commits <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(nrow(d))
  })
  output$vb_median_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(median(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })
  output$vb_mean_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(mean(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })

  output$commit_hist <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    h <- hist(d$lines_changed, breaks = 30, plot = FALSE)
    bins <- tibble(mid = h$mids, count = h$counts)
    e <- bins |> e_charts(mid) |>
      e_bar(count, name = "Commits", color = pal$hist, legend = FALSE)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$commit_scatter_time <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    e <- d |> e_charts(date) |>
      e_scatter(lines_changed, size = files_changed, name = "Commit",
                color = pal$claude, legend = FALSE)
    dark_echart(e)
  })

  output$commit_scatter_add_del <- renderEcharts4r({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(empty_echart())
    e <- d |> e_charts(lines_added) |>
      e_scatter(lines_deleted, size = files_changed, name = "Commit",
                color = pal$gemini, legend = FALSE)
    dark_echart(e)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
